topbar.auto_sync_help_on: BizTrack will sync in the background when your connection is good enough.
topbar.auto_sync_help_off: Changes stay local until you sync manually or turn auto-sync back on.

search.label: Find a report
search.placeholder: Search by report name, module, or source
search.hint: Search across sales, inventory, finance, and credit reports.
search.empty_description: Try another keyword or clear the search to browse the full catalogue.

errors.missing_dates: Choose both a start date and an end date.
errors.invalid_range: The end date must be on or after the start date.

preview.contact_statement_note: Use the exported report to print a single contact statement. This preview highlights the largest open balances in the selected range.
preview.no_debt_data: No debt activity was found for this period.
preview.no_expense_data: No expense activity was found for this period.
preview.no_inventory_data: No inventory data is available yet.
preview.no_low_stock_alerts: No low-stock alerts are active right now.
preview.no_movement_data: No inventory movement was recorded for this period.
preview.no_restock_data: No restocks were recorded for this period.
preview.no_sales_data: No sales activity was found for this period.
preview.no_voided_sales: No voided sales were found for this period.

export.title: Export current report
export.pdf_desktop_only: PDF export is available only in the desktop app.
export.pdf_error: We could not export the PDF.
export.excel_error: We could not export the Excel file.
export.csv_error: We could not export the CSV.
export.share_error: We could not prepare the share file.

general.title: General
general.subtitle: Update your business information.
general.offline_warning: You need to be online to update business settings.

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Manage who has access to this business.
team.remove_confirm_body: This member will lose access to the business immediately.
team.upgrade_hint: Team management requires the Business plan. <link>Upgrade your plan</link> to invite and manage team members.
team.offline_warning: You are offline. Connect to the internet to manage your team.
team.invite_link_hint: Share this link with the invitee — they'll need it to accept the invitation.
team.invite_link_whatsapp_message: You're invited to join our team on BizTrack. Click the link to accept: {url}

roles.title: Roles
roles.subtitle: Define what each role can do in your business.
roles.owner_only_hint: Only the business owner can create and modify roles.
roles.offline_warning: You are offline. Roles management requires an internet connection.
roles.delete_confirm_body: This role will be permanently deleted. All members must be moved off this role before it can be removed.
roles.create_description_placeholder: Optional — describe what this role is for
roles.detail_system_notice: System roles are managed by BizTrack and cannot be modified.
roles.members_empty: No members have this role yet.
roles.add_members_empty: All members already have this role or are owners.
roles.add_members_warning: The following members will have their role changed. This may upgrade or downgrade their access.
roles.no_permission: You don't have permission to manage roles.
roles.no_permission_hint: Ask your business owner to grant you the 'Manage roles' permission.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.subtitle: Manage your plan and billing.
subscription.cancel_section_body: Cancelling will move your business to the Free plan at the end of the current billing period.

empty.title: No savings accounts yet
empty.subtitle: Create a new deposit to open a savings account for a customer.

deposit.title: New deposit
deposit.description: Record a customer deposit. If the customer already has an account, the deposit will be added to their balance.

refund.title: Refund
refund.description: Issue a refund from the savings account balance.

errors.SAVINGS_AMOUNT_INVALID: Amount must be greater than zero

login.title: Welcome
login.error_default: Unable to continue. Please try again.
login.offline_no_hash: No offline password is stored on this device. Connect to the internet to login.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Start your BizTrack setup.
register.invite_field_locked: Pre-filled from your invitation — cannot be changed.

login_otp.title: Login code
login_otp.subtitle: Enter the code sent by SMS or WhatsApp.

verify_email.title: Verify email
verify_email.subtitle: Enter the code sent by email.

setup_business.title: Your business
setup_business.subtitle: Let us complete the main information.

select_plan.title: Choose a plan
select_plan.subtitle: Select a plan to activate your business.

first_product.title: First product
first_product.subtitle: Add your first product to get started.
